arts.ttl: Karim Benzema speaks out on possibility of Real Madrid return
arts.sum: Real Madrid legend Karim Benzema this weekend refused to rule out the possibility of a return to the club down the line. Frontman Benzema, for his part, of course brought…

arts.ttl: The surprising price of Real Madrid vs Barcelona Super Cup Clásico final tickets in Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: While the first 2025 Spanish Super Cup semifinal in Saudi Arabia drew 39,000 spectators and the second nearly 47,000, the prospect of Real Madrid and Barcelona facing each other in El Clásico in the final changes everything. Both the Spanish Soccer Federation (RFEF) and Saudi organizers expect the King Abdullah Sports City Stadium to be filled to capacity, or very close to it.

arts.ttl: What time is Real Madrid vs Barcelona and where to watch the Spanish Super Cup final in USA?
arts.sum: A nother edition of the Clasico will take place in the final of the Spanish Super Cup, when Real Madrid and FC Barcelona play for another title between them, and where Los Blancos are looking to equal the number of titles of the Catalans. Where is the Super Cup final between Real Madrid and Barcelona?

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick is happy that Vinícius Jr. will be available to face Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has admitted that he considers it a good thing that Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. will be available to feature against his side on Sunday.…

arts.ttl: Rashford closer to Milan than Barcelona as Man Utd decide transfer formula
arts.sum: La Gazzetta dello Sport claims Manchester United are ready to part ways with Marcus Rashford...

arts.ttl: Robbie Fowler offers Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer hint after stunning display in FA Cup win with out-of-contract England right back heavily linked with Real Madrid move
arts.sum: Liverpool legend Robbie Fowler has given a hint over whether Trent Alexander-Arnold will stay at the club. Alexander-Arnold's Liverpool future remains shrouded in uncertainty.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Barcelona: Will Jude Bellingham, Federico Valverde, Aurelien Tchouameni be available for El Clasico?
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti reveals that Jude Bellingham is fit for Sunday's Spanish Super Cup final against Barcelona, while Federico Valverde and Aurelien Tchouameni are also available.

arts.ttl: How much did Juventus offer for Barcelona star Ronald Araújo?
arts.sum: An insight into the financial details of the offer tabled by Juventus for Barcelona star Ronald Araújo has been forthcoming online. And it goes some way towards explaining why the…

arts.ttl: Chelsea blow Real Madrid out of the water in Dutch wonderkid race
arts.sum: If an interested party is actually prepared to shell out a sizeable fee for Hato this month, it will be difficult to say 'no' given Ajax's financial situation. CaughtOffside claims that the 18-year-old defender is in the spotlight of several European top clubs, with Chelsea currently leading the race for his signature.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti provides injury update on Real Madrid pair before Barcelona
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Saturday provided updates on the wellbeing of two leading members of his midfield ranks. This comes after Jude Bellingham and Federico Valverde…
